steps.title: Connect claim to example
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim about mushroom species containing phenolic compounds. The second gives specific detections of protocatechuic acid and biochanin in named mushrooms, so it illustrates the claim.

steps.title: Reject contrast and cause
steps.content: A and B signal contrast, but the sentences agree. C signals a result, but Costa's detections are evidence, not an effect caused by the first sentence. The transition should introduce an illustration. The answer is D.
